extension.description: GitBlms brings GoLand-style inline Git blame to VS Code, with age buckets, uncommitted highlighting, and bilingual UI.
command.toggleBlame.title: Toggle Inline Git Blame
command.showBlame.title: Show Inline Git Blame
command.hideBlame.title: Hide Inline Git Blame
command.showGutter.title: Show Git Gutter
command.hideGutter.title: Hide Git Gutter
command.openCommitDetails.title: Open Commit Details
configuration.title: GitBlms
config.enabled.description: Enable or disable inline Git blame annotations globally.
config.colorScheme.description: Primary annotation palette: blue, green, or purple.
config.dateFormat.description: Timestamp display format: relative or absolute.
config.maxLineCount.description: Skip blame rendering for files over this line count.
config.maxAnnotationWidth.description: Maximum width of the left blame column in ch units.
config.uncommittedColor.description: Color used for uncommitted lines. Use a hex value such as #2ea043 to get a picker or inline preview in Settings.
config.highlightCurrentAuthor.descriptio: Highlight lines authored by the current Git user with a separate accent color.
config.currentAuthorColor.description: Accent color for the current Git user's committed lines. Use a hex value such as #d97706 to get a picker or inline preview in Settings.
config.language.description: Extension display language: auto, zh-CN, or en.
